instructions:
Build a candidate dossier for Andrew Friedson (Montgomery County Executive Democratic primary 2026, currently District 1 County Councilmember). Listener has explicitly asked for voting records, prior public statements, sponsored bills, and controversies — go look them up with web search. Cite each claim with a URL. Output is a Markdown file with these sections:
  1. Bio (one paragraph)
  2. Voting record by topic (table or bulleted list, with bill numbers)
  3. Public statements & policy positions (quoted, with links)
  4. Sponsored / co-sponsored legislation (with status)
  5. Controversies or notable press (neutral framing, sourced)
  6. Stance on listener-flagged topics: sanctuary policy, school funding, property tax, Wootton High School relocation, fiscal discipline
  7. Open questions the next podcast deep-dive should answer.
Length: 800–1500 words. Cite everything. If a record cannot be found, say so explicitly — do not fabricate.

NOTE: This dossier was queued by the deepdive_2026-04-30_friedson brief because that brief had no prior dossier_path. The Cowork agent producing the deep-dive script also produced this dossier inline in the same run from web research, so this brief should be marked .done.json by that same run.
